title: Mighty's DND Origins
description: Origins based on some DND classes.
body:
Adds 4 origins based on some DnD classes. More origins are planned.

Currently adds the following origins:
- Barbarian
- Wizard
- Ranger
- Monk

And 3 recipes.

**USE THE RESOURCE PACK** or some stuff will probably look wonky.
This needs polishing and a bit of balancing. I guess I'll fix that in the near future.
You are free to use this in any modpack, just credit me.
It should not crash your game, if it does, please contact me so I can fix it asap.

To-Do's:
- Balance ranger
- ~~Fix wizard powers' names and descs.~~
- Add warlock
- Add rogue
- Add cleric
- Add bard

I only created this project to test what I could do with the mod.
